description: A Swift 6 / SwiftUI application for Apple Silicon that transforms photographs into photographic mosaics using Metal-accelerated tile matching, Core Image processing, and AVFoundation video export. Port of the classic AndreaMosaic C++/MFC engine to modern Apple platform technologies.
stack: Swift 6 / SwiftUI / Metal / Core Image / AVFoundation

wave_1.title: Wave 1: Foundation Models
wave_1.description: Tile, ImageLoader, Settings, and Color Analysis -- the core data types and image loading pipeline that every subsequent wave depends on.

wave_2.title: Wave 2: Tile Management
wave_2.description: TileCollectionManager, CPU Tile Scorer, and Tile Cache -- managing tile libraries and implementing the baseline color-distance scoring algorithm.

wave_3.title: Wave 3: Engine Core
wave_3.description: MosaicBuilder, Color Adjustment, Metal Tile Scorer, and MosaicPlan -- the heart of the mosaic engine with GPU-accelerated matching and intermediate plan representation.

wave_4.title: Wave 4: Output
wave_4.description: MosaicExporter (JPEG/PNG/TIFF), Build Reports, and WebMosaicExporter -- rendering final output at full resolution with analytics and interactive HTML deep-zoom viewers.

wave_5.title: Wave 5: SwiftUI Interface
wave_5.description: Menu bar, Mosaic Editor, Collection Browser, and Live Preview -- the full document-based SwiftUI application shell with real-time Metal-backed preview.

wave_6.title: Wave 6: Advanced Features
wave_6.description: Patterns (hex, Voronoi, spiral), Masks, Adaptive Tile Splitting, Video Mosaic via AVFoundation, and PSD Layer Export -- extending beyond the original AndreaMosaic feature set.

technology_mapping.title: Technology Port Mapping
technology_mapping.description: Original C++/MFC components mapped to their Swift/macOS equivalents
